title: tragacantha schottiana
intro: Tragacantha schottiana, also known as Astragalus schottianus, is a species of legume plant in the genus Astragalus. It is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. The plant is used in traditional medicine and is known to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The herbal preparations of Tragacantha schottiana include teas, infusions, and extracts, which have been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and digestive issues, with benefits including improved immune function and reduced oxidative stress.
